case_title: PHYLLIS CONTO VS. WYETH LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-05-2014 CONTINUED TO MAR-04-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-04-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. BY COURT. PER ORDER FILED DECEMBER 18, 2014, THIS CASE HAS BEEN ADDED TO JUDICIAL COUNCIL COORDINATION PROCEEDING NO. 4631, REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONTO, PHYLLIS AS TO DEFENDANT WYETH LLC SCHWARZ PHARMA, INC. ESI LEDERLE, INC. PLIVA, INC., INDIVIDUALLY AND F/K/A SIDMARK LABORA TORIES, INC. MCKESSON CORPORATION JOHN DOE DRUG COMPANY DEFENDANTS (1-500) SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-05-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-14-2014 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
